description: Skills referenced by team-bootstrap roles. Skills are external to this repo — install separately from your skill marketplace of choice (e.g. /plugin install <name>, or git clone into ~/.claude/skills/). Run bin/check-skills.sh to verify presence before invoking the relevant pipelines.

recommended.name: tavily-research
recommended.purpose: Multi-source cited research — 2026 SaaS comps, patent landscape, Glassdoor / Levels.fyi data, foundation-model TOS verification

recommended.name: competitor-analysis
recommended.purpose: SWOT, positioning, differentiation across direct + adjacent competitors. Core skill for market-analyst.
recommended.fallback: WebSearch + manual analysis (significantly more tokens and less structured)

recommended.name: 30x-seo-ai-visibility
recommended.purpose: Empirically measures brand visibility across ChatGPT / Claude / Perplexity / Gemini / Google AI Overview. Answers 'can LLMs reach our JTBD?' directly instead of by speculation.
recommended.fallback: WebSearch each LLM platform manually (extremely token-expensive, less reliable)

recommended.name: data-storyteller
recommended.purpose: Narrative reports with charts, audits, comparisons, statistical summaries. Turns cohort tables into executive-ready output.
recommended.fallback: Raw tables in markdown (readable but not investor-punchy)

recommended.name: research-synthesis
recommended.purpose: Synthesize interview transcripts, support tickets, NPS open-text, exit surveys into themes + segment patterns + prioritized insights.

recommended.name: web-scraper
recommended.purpose: Structured extraction from competitor pricing pages, Glassdoor reviews, OSS license pages

optional.name: find-keywords
optional.purpose: Demand-side validation — search-volume signal for the segment
optional.fallback: skip — most DD doesn't need keyword landscape

optional.name: anthropic-skills:xlsx
optional.purpose: Parse .xlsx / .xlsm / .csv exports of financial models, cohort tables, retention data
optional.fallback: Convert spreadsheets to CSV first, parse with Read+Grep (manual, error-prone for formulas)
optional.note: Bundled with Anthropic skill pack; available as `anthropic-skills:xlsx`

optional.name: anthropic-skills:pdf
optional.purpose: Parse audited financials (PDF), contract PDFs (MSAs, DPAs), produce memo PDF deliverables
optional.fallback: OCR + manual paste (very token-expensive, lossy)

optional.name: anthropic-skills:docx
optional.purpose: Parse Word contract templates; produce memo as .docx deliverable
optional.fallback: Convert to markdown first

required.name: humanize
required.purpose: Bypasses AI-detection signals (GPTZero, Originality.ai, etc.) on outbound content. **Pipeline-blocking** for partnerships-lead (outreach + co-launch comms) and community-manager (every published community post + moderation response). AI-detected content in these contexts destroys trust permanently.
required.fallback: **No fallback** — role returns status:blocked if missing

required.name: humanize-ai-text
required.purpose: Reduces AI-detection patterns in personal communications. **Pipeline-blocking** for customer-success-manager (renewal / expansion / at-risk sequences) and community-manager (ambassador program copy). Distinct from `humanize`: this skill focuses on natural phrasing + tone adjustment for personal-feeling 1:1 messages, while `humanize` focuses on detector-bypass for public broadcasts.
required.fallback: **No fallback** — role returns status:blocked if missing

required.name: persona-customer-support
required.purpose: Customer-management framework: ticket triage patterns, escalation tiers, response patterns. **Pipeline-blocking** for customer-success-manager (health framework + onboarding escalation triage). Used non-blocking by community-manager (moderation playbook), product-marketer (ICP modeling), ux-designer (operator-interface persona constraints).
required.fallback: **No fallback for customer-success-manager** — manual customer-management framework fails QA. Graceful fallback for other roles (manual persona modeling).

required.name: research-synthesis
required.purpose: Synthesize raw research (interview transcripts, NPS, support tickets, community signals) into themes + segment patterns. **Pipeline-blocking** for customer-success-manager (VoC report theme extraction). Used non-blocking by community-manager (community VoC) and ux-designer (research synthesis before flow design).
required.fallback: **No fallback for customer-success-manager** — unstructured summary fails QA on theme density. Graceful fallback for other roles.

required.name: idea-refine
required.purpose: Divergent → convergent thinking for narrowing options. **Pipeline-blocking** for partnerships-lead (partnership thesis convergence — must show audit trail of N candidates → 3-5 priorities). Non-blocking for design + product-marketer roles.
required.fallback: **No fallback for partnerships-lead** — unstructured prioritization fails QA on convergence rigor. Graceful fallback for other roles (manual brainstorm + critique).

recommended.name: frontend-ui-engineering
recommended.purpose: Production-quality UI patterns — design-system adherence, accessibility, composition rules, anti-AI-aesthetic principles. Highest-leverage skill for ui-designer; without it the reference prototype tends toward generic AI aesthetic.
recommended.fallback: Manual reference from shadcn/ui + Tailwind docs; significantly less coherent design system output

recommended.name: competitor-analysis
recommended.purpose: SWOT + positioning + differentiation analysis. Used by 7 roles in the full pipeline; install once, used many times. Maps specific UX/UI patterns (design roles), positioning differentials (product-marketer), channel benchmarks (growth-marketer), competitive threats per account (CSM), partnership overlap (partnerships-lead), community gaps (community-manager).
recommended.fallback: WebSearch + manual analysis (acceptable but slower and less structured)

recommended.name: tavily-research
recommended.purpose: Multi-source cited research. Used by 6 roles: established UX patterns for novel interactions (ux-designer), pricing comps + recent funding (product-marketer), channel benchmarks (growth-marketer), per-account industry context for QBRs (CSM), partner ecosystem mapping (partnerships-lead), where ICP gathers (community-manager).
recommended.fallback: WebFetch + manual triangulation (acceptable but 10× token cost)

recommended.name: data-storyteller
recommended.purpose: Executive-ready narrative reports + charts + cohort analysis. Used by 4 post-release roles: health score viz + cohort retention (CSM), partnership performance dashboard (partnerships-lead), community health dashboard (community-manager), growth metrics narrative (growth-marketer).
recommended.fallback: Raw markdown tables (loses narrative + escalation framing)

recommended.name: copywriter
recommended.purpose: Compelling marketing / product / community copy. Used by 5 roles for: messaging hierarchy + launch announcements (product-marketer), landing pages + ads + email (growth-marketer), communication templates (CSM), outreach + announcements (partnerships-lead), ambassador recruitment + community comms (community-manager).

recommended.name: brief
recommended.purpose: Editor-ready content brief structure. Used by 4 roles: content briefs with SEO + AEO structure (product-marketer, growth-marketer), per-partner brief template (partnerships-lead), ambassador handbook structure (community-manager).
recommended.fallback: Manual brief composition (acceptable but less structured)

recommended.name: social-media-posts
recommended.purpose: Platform-specific content (LinkedIn / Twitter / Reddit / Facebook / Instagram) with hook + character limits + hashtag strategy. Used by 3 roles: multi-platform community content (growth-marketer), co-launch announcements (partnerships-lead), daily engagement engine (community-manager).
recommended.fallback: Manual platform-by-platform composition (acceptable, slower, less converting)

recommended.name: research-synthesis
recommended.purpose: Already listed in required (blocking for CSM). Note: graceful-fallback usage for community-manager (VoC) and ux-designer (pre-flow research).

recommended.name: idea-refine
recommended.purpose: Already listed in required (blocking for partnerships-lead). Note: graceful-fallback usage for design + product-marketer roles.

optional.name: api-and-interface-design
optional.purpose: Component prop contract design — composition vs configuration, slot patterns, hard-to-misuse APIs at the component-interface level.
optional.fallback: Reference shadcn/ui prop patterns; less rigorous interface design

optional.name: image-generation
optional.purpose: Custom iconography or illustration reference (agent glyphs, empty-state art, brand imagery preview before commissioning).
optional.fallback: Source from existing icon libraries (Phosphor, Lucide, Heroicons); commission custom work separately

optional.name: documentation-and-adrs
optional.purpose: Design-system ADRs (token naming rationale, motion timing decisions, color palette choices) that survive team changes.
optional.fallback: Inline rationale in design tokens file

optional.name: tavily-research
optional.purpose: Cited examples of established UX patterns for novel interactions (agentic UIs, approval queues, training loops).
optional.fallback: WebSearch + manual pattern collection

optional.name: persona-customer-support
optional.purpose: Persona constraints + ticket triage flow patterns when designing customer-facing operator interfaces; ICP modeling from real support data for product-marketer.
optional.fallback: Manual persona modeling from product brief

optional.name: competitor-analysis
optional.purpose: SWOT + positioning + differentiation analysis. Core skill for product-marketer (battle cards) and growth-marketer (channel benchmarks).
optional.fallback: Manual WebSearch + analysis (more tokens, less structured)
optional.note: Same skill referenced by multiple roles; install once, used many times

optional.name: copywriter
optional.purpose: Compelling web/marketing/product copy for messaging hierarchy, launch announcements, landing pages, ad creative.
optional.fallback: Manual copywriting (acceptable but slower and less converting)

optional.name: brief
optional.purpose: Editor-ready content brief for blog/landing-page/launch announcement copy with SEO + AEO structure.
optional.fallback: Manual brief composition

optional.name: 30x-seo-ai-visibility
optional.purpose: Empirically measure AI visibility baseline + competitor benchmark across ChatGPT / Claude / Perplexity / Gemini / Google AI Overview. Highest-leverage skill for growth-marketer in 2026 — without it AEO/GEO strategy is speculation.
optional.fallback: WebSearch each LLM platform manually (extremely token-expensive, less reliable)
optional.note: Same skill used by audit-dd market-analyst

optional.name: ai-seo
optional.purpose: AEO / GEO content strategy + LLM citation optimization patterns. Different methodology from classical SEO.
optional.fallback: Manual research on AI-search optimization (rapidly evolving, knowledge ages quickly)

optional.name: seo-aeo-best-practices
optional.purpose: Schema, structured data, JSON-LD, answer-first content blocks, EEAT — best practices for both Google and AI answer surfaces (2026-current).
optional.fallback: Manual research on each pattern (high token cost)

optional.name: seo-audit
optional.purpose: Technical SEO baseline audit + issue prioritization before growth investment. Surface CWV, schema, crawl, indexing issues.
optional.fallback: Manual technical SEO audit (slow, error-prone)

optional.name: seo-geo
optional.purpose: Generative Engine Optimization — compound SEO + AEO across regions + languages + AI search engines.
optional.fallback: Run classical SEO + AEO separately without geographic / multi-engine coordination

optional.name: find-keywords
optional.purpose: Prioritized keyword list per content cluster with demand signal + intent mapping.
optional.fallback: Manual keyword brainstorm + intuition (often misses opportunities)
optional.note: Same skill optionally used by audit-dd market-analyst

optional.name: programmatic-seo
optional.purpose: Template-driven page generation for scale (location pages, comparison pages, integration pages, [keyword]+[city] pages). When scaling content to 100s/1000s of pages.
optional.fallback: Manual page-by-page creation (does not scale)

optional.name: backlink-analyzer
optional.purpose: Authority gap analysis vs competitors — informs digital PR + partnership + linkable-asset strategy.
optional.fallback: Manual backlink audit via third-party tools (similar quality, more friction)

optional.name: social-media-posts
optional.purpose: Platform-specific content (LinkedIn / Twitter / Reddit / Facebook / Instagram) with hook + character limits + hashtag strategy + image specs per platform.
optional.fallback: Manual platform-by-platform composition

optional.name: image-generation
optional.purpose: Reference visuals — custom iconography (ui-designer), ambassador badges + event banners + reaction visuals (community-manager).
optional.fallback: Source from existing libraries; commission custom work separately
